prompt:
Goal: Create a stylish men's fashion editorial collage / mood board featuring an anonymous well-groomed adult man with every face intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur block.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 image, approximately 1024×576, with a clean off-white studio background and thick white collage gutters separating the photos.

Layout: Arrange exactly 6 distinct photo panels in an asymmetrical magazine grid: 1) far-left tall full-body portrait of the man standing in a navy three-piece suit with hands in pockets, 2) large upper-left close portrait of him in a dark charcoal knit sweater with clasped hands near his chin, 3) narrow top-center dark moody head-and-shoulders portrait with dramatic low-key lighting, 4) upper-right mid/full-body walking pose in a black leather biker jacket over a light shirt, 5) far-right tall full-body portrait leaning casually in a beige trench coat over dark trousers, 6) bottom-center wide portrait of him seated or turned sideways wearing an olive bomber jacket over a black shirt. Include a partial bottom-left cropped detail panel showing his wrists, watch, rings, and suit sleeves.

Subject details: The man has dark brown slicked-back hair, a neat masculine fashion-model presence, average-to-tall build, and polished grooming. Hide all facial features with rectangular pixelated/soft blur masks in warm beige-brown tones, centered over each face, with no visible eyes, nose, or mouth.

Wardrobe and accessories: Show exactly 5 main outfits: navy suit with white open-collar shirt, charcoal sweater, black leather jacket with white T-shirt, beige trench coat with patterned shirt and black trousers, and olive bomber jacket with black shirt. Include visible accessories in the cropped detail: one wristwatch and two rings.

Visual style: High-end menswear lookbook photography, muted colors, soft studio lighting mixed with one dramatic shadowy portrait, realistic fabric texture, shallow depth of field in closeups, refined editorial styling, minimal background distractions.

Constraints: No text, no logos, no watermark. Keep the collage grid crisp and geometric. Preserve the anonymized-face concept clearly across all visible portraits.
